response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly matching the company's AI-native focus. He has a proven track record with high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second, and demonstrates strong ownership through Staff-level roles and open-source founding. While the absence of Python on his resume is a notable gap against the must-have requirements, his deep systems thinking and TypeScript proficiency make him a strong prospect.
strengths: Hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Demonstrated expertise in high-throughput architectures, handling millions of HTTP requests per second.
Strong technical leadership and ownership mindset, evidenced by Staff roles and founding an open-source platform.
concerns: Lacks demonstrable experience with Python, which is listed as a strong must-have skill.
Recent Staff role in AI infrastructure has a very short tenure (started April 2025).
Past high-performance backend experience relies heavily on DLang rather than mainstream Python/TypeScript ecosystems.
